summary: Completed backend testing for Caribbean & Central America expansion, push notifications, and note reply threading. All 23 tests passed. Verified spots exist for Puerto Rico (10 spots including Soup Bowl), Barbados (9 spots), Dominican Republic (16 spots including Cabarete), Costa Rica (44 spots including Pavones, Witch's Rock, Salsa Brava), Nicaragua (14 spots including Popoyo), Panama (11 spots including Santa Catalina), El Salvador (15 spots including Punta Roca).

minor.issue: Puerto Rico missing 'Rincon - Domes' and 'Tres Palmas' from expansion script - spots may not have been synced

action_items: Run the expansion script /app/backend/scripts/expand_caribbean_central_america.py to add missing spots (Rincon - Domes, Tres Palmas, etc.)
critical_code_review_comments: Push notifications use fire-and-forget pattern (asyncio.create_task) - failures won't block API responses
OneSignal service properly configured with APP_ID and REST_API_KEY in backend/.env
Note reply creates Message record with format: '📝 Replying to note: "[content]"\n\n[reply_text]'
Conversation preview updated with '📝 Note reply: [reply_text]' format
context_for_next_testing_agent: Caribbean & Central America spots verified. Push notifications integrated in social.py (follow), messages.py (send message), notes.py (note reply). Note reply threading creates Message record in conversation. Endpoint is /api/surf-spots (not /api/spots).

caribbean_spots.barbados: PASS - 9 spots (Soup Bowl, South Point, Freights, Tropicana, etc.)
caribbean_spots.dominican_republic: PASS - 16 spots (Cabarete, Playa Encuentro, El Pipe, Playa Grande, etc.)

push_notifications.send_message_endpoint: PASS - POST /api/messages/send has OneSignal integration (messages.py lines 447-456)
